compiled_state.title: RED test: Assert hypothesis_tests schema across all test files
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

Write failing tests that assert the new hypothesis_tests field exists with correct sub-fields and instructional prose in SKILL.md and all 10 investigation prompts.

### Files to modify

1. tests/skills/test_fix_bug_skill.py:
   - Add test_hypothesis_tests_schema_in_skill() — asserts SKILL.md contains hypothesis_tests with sub-fields hypothesis, test, observed, verdict; asserts tests_run does NOT appear as a field name anywhere in SKILL.md
   - Add test_fallback_and_cluster_prompts_hypothesis_tests() — asserts intermediate-investigation-fallback.md and cluster-investigation.md each contain hypothesis_tests in their RESULT section AND instructional prose referencing hypothesis_tests; asserts neither contains tests_run. NOTE: cluster-investigation.md has THREE separate tests_run blocks (single-root-cause RESULT and two inside multi-root-cause RESULTS array) — assert tests_run is entirely absent, not just that hypothesis_tests appears once.

2. Modify 8 dedicated per-prompt test files (one function per file):
   - test_basic_investigation_prompt.py → add test_basic_prompt_hypothesis_tests_fields()
   - test_intermediate_investigation_prompt.py → add test_intermediate_prompt_hypothesis_tests_fields()
   - test_advanced_investigation_agent_a_prompt.py → add test_advanced_a_prompt_hypothesis_tests_fields()
   - test_advanced_investigation_agent_b_prompt.py → add test_advanced_b_prompt_hypothesis_tests_fields()
   - test_escalated_investigation_agent_1_prompt.py → add test_escalated_1_prompt_hypothesis_tests_fields()
   - test_escalated_investigation_agent_2_prompt.py → add test_escalated_2_prompt_hypothesis_tests_fields()
   - test_escalated_investigation_agent_3_prompt.py → add test_escalated_3_prompt_hypothesis_tests_fields()
   - test_escalated_investigation_agent_4_prompt.py → add test_escalated_4_prompt_hypothesis_tests_fields()
   Each test reads the prompt file and asserts: (a) hypothesis_tests present with correct sub-fields in RESULT schema block, (b) instructional prose references hypothesis_tests (not just in schema block), (c) old tests_run field name is absent

3. Add .test-index RED markers for all 10 new test functions

### TDD
This IS the RED test task — all tests will fail until Tasks 2 and 3 implement the schema changes.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0) — RED markers in .test-index tolerate expected failures
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] `ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] `ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] Test function test_hypothesis_tests_schema_in_skill exists in test_fix_bug_skill.py
  Verify: grep -q 'def test_hypothesis_tests_schema_in_skill' tests/skills/test_fix_bug_skill.py
- [ ] Test function test_fallback_and_cluster_prompts_hypothesis_tests exists in test_fix_bug_skill.py
  Verify: grep -q 'def test_fallback_and_cluster_prompts_hypothesis_tests' tests/skills/test_fix_bug_skill.py
- [ ] 8 dedicated per-prompt test files each contain a hypothesis_tests test function
  Verify: for f in test_basic_investigation_prompt test_intermediate_investigation_prompt test_advanced_investigation_agent_a_prompt test_advanced_investigation_agent_b_prompt test_escalated_investigation_agent_1_prompt test_escalated_investigation_agent_2_prompt test_escalated_investigation_agent_3_prompt test_escalated_investigation_agent_4_prompt; do grep -q 'hypothesis_tests' tests/skills/${f}.py || exit 1; done
- [ ] .test-index RED markers added for all new tests
  Verify: grep -c '\[test_.*hypothesis' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index | awk '{exit ($1 < 10)}'
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Gap Analysis Amendment

For cluster-investigation.md test (test_fallback_and_cluster_prompts_hypothesis_tests): assert that ALL 3 hypothesis_tests blocks have the correct sub-field names (hypothesis, test, observed, verdict) and that old sub-field names (command, result) are entirely absent from the file — not just that hypothesis_tests appears.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Verification — ruff format+check pass, all 10 new tests RED as expected, 134 pre-existing tests still pass ✓
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — 10 RED test functions added across 9 test files. All assert hypothesis_tests schema with correct sub-fields. RED markers in .test-index.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
